summary: Hi! How are you? | Good, thanks for asking! How about yourself? | What's your favorite book? | I have a few favorites, but one of my favorites is The Name of the Wind by Patrick Rothfuss.
I've heard good things about that book! I'll have to check it out. | It's a great book! I hope you enjoy it. | I love to dance salsa. | That's awesome! I've always wanted to learn how to dance salsa.

It's so much fun! You should definitely try it. | Maybe I will | That sounds like a lot of fun. I have always wanted to learn how to weld. | It is not too hard to learn. There are a lot of great YouTube videos that can teach you how.
I will have to check them out. Thanks for the tip. | Hi, I'm a circus juggler from the midwest, how are you? | I'm doing well too, thanks! I'm glad to hear that. | So, what do you like to do for fun?

I like to watch old movies from my childhood. I also like to travel and take pictures. | That sounds like fun! I like to watch action movies with my family on Netflix. | Me too. It's a great way to relax. | Yeah, it is

What is your favorite food? | My dad is a chef and my sister is a server so my favorite food is always on the table. | I think it's important to have a balance between the two, so you don't get too burned out. | I agree, it's important to take some time for yourself to relax and recharge.

So, what are you looking for in a home? | I'm looking for a cozy, quiet home with plenty of space for my dog and me. | Me too! I love enchiladas with chicken and cheese. I also like tacos with ground beef and guacamole. | Those are my favorite toppings for enchiladas and tacos! I also like to put sour cream and salsa on my tacos.

Me too! I love sour cream and salsa on my tacos and burritos. | I'm glad we have similar taste in food! It's always nice to meet someone who likes the same things you do. | Thanks! I'm looking forward to it. | Hello, how are you today?

I'm doing great, thank you! I'm excited to be visiting my brother in another city. | Oh, that's wonderful! I hope you enjoy your trip. | It is good that you learned from your mistake.  What are you interested in doing in the future? | I am interested in producing music, and I would love to be a stay at home dad.  I would have a crib mobile with Disney characters on it in my baby's nursery.
That sounds like a wonderful plan.  I hope everything works out for you. | Thank you, I appreciate that. | Thank you. I try my best. | I am sure you do. You seem like a great person.
Thank you. You seem great too. | Thanks! I am always looking for friends. | I think so too! | How are you doing today?
I'm doing good! It's a nice day outside. | It is! I'm spending the day working on a mural I'm painting. | I like how you're honest and straightforward. | Thanks! I like that about you too.
I'm glad. | Me too. | I'm not sure yet, but I'm thinking about something in the music industry. | That would be cool! I'm not much of a musician myself, but I love listening to music.

Yeah, music is amazing. It's one of the things that brings me the most joy in life. | Me too. It's so powerful. What do you like to listen to? | You should!  They are really good.  What are some of your favorite movies? | I like a lot of different types of movies, but I really like the Lord of the Rings trilogy.

I love the Lord of the Rings movies too!  They are so good. | They are!  I have seen them all so many times. | Oh, that doesn't sound too bad. I might have to try that sometime. | You should! It's really good.
I will! Thanks for the suggestion. | No problem | Sure, here's a picture of my alpacas. | They're so cute! I love their fluffy coats.

Thanks! I love them too. | What do you do for a living? | That sounds like a lot of fun. I like to spend time with my family too. I used to be a nurse but now I just stay at home and take care of my mom. | That's really nice of you to do. I'm sure your mom appreciates it.

Yeah, she does. She's my best friend. | That's great. It's good to have a close relationship with your mom. | That's great! I'm glad you enjoy your work. I'm a security guard, so my days are also pretty long and busy. | Oh, that's interesting! What do you like about being a security guard?

I like the variety of work, and I enjoy being able to help people. | That's great! I think it's really important to have a job that you enjoy. | Me too! They're so sweet and juicy. | I like to eat them plain, but I also like to put them in smoothies.
I like to put them in yogurt too. | Strawberries are so versatile! | It is a great way to relieve stress! I love it. | So, what made you want to get into archery?

I used to be a teacher, but I wanted to spend more time with my family. So, I quit my job and started practicing archery. | That's so great! I'm glad you found something you love doing. | I'm a dog groomer. I love working with dogs and making them look their best. | That sounds like a really fun job too!

It is! I get to spend my days with dogs and I get to help people take care of their pets. | That's awesome! I'm glad you like your job. | I really like the Harry Potter series, and I also like the Lord of the Rings series. | Oh those are both great series! I've read them both multiple times.

Me too! I love how immersive they are. | Yeah they're definitely some of the best fantasy novels ever written. | You should! It's a lot of fun. | I'm a bit scared of heights, but I'll give it a try sometime.
You'll be fine! Just trust the rope. | I'll have to take your word for it. | What are some of your favorite books? | I like to read a variety of books, but my favorite genre is horror.

I love horror movies! Do you have any favorite horror movies? | My favorite horror movie is The Conjuring. | That is great to hear! Are you doing anything fun this weekend? | I am going to volunteer at my local animal shelter. I love animals.
Oh that is so nice of you! I am sure the animals appreciate it. | Thanks! I used to play sports, but my back pain has made it too difficult. | Thanks! I hope so. | What do you drive?
I drive a blue Honda Civic. | Nice! I have a Honda Accord. | That's cool! I like to listen to Ween to get my creative juices flowing. | I've never heard of Ween before. What kind of music is it?

It's a genre of rock music. They have a lot of different influences, but they're mostly known for their unique sound. | Interesting. I'll have to check them out. | You should! I'm sure you'd love it. | I definitely will!

Great! Let me know if you have any questions about Mexico. | Thanks, I will! | Hi! I'm an animal rights activist and I'm happy to tell you more. | That's great! What got you interested in animal rights activism?

I have always loved animals and I was really upset when I learned about all the cruelty that goes on in the meat and dairy industry. I decided that I had to do something to help, so I started volunteering with an animal rights group. | That's really amazing! What kind of work do you do with the group? | I'm going to write some more and then go for a walk on the beach. | Hey there! How are you doing?

I'm doing well, thank you! How about you? | I'm doing well! What's going on in your life? | Hi, mine is "Sorry" by Justin Bieber. Do you have a favorite artist? | I like the band Queens of the Stone Age.
I've never heard of them. What kind of music do they play? | They are a rock band. | I have a golden retriever. | Golden retrievers are so cute! What kind of cat do you have?
I have a Maine Coon. | Maine Coons are so fluffy! | That sounds really cool. I've always wanted to drive a mustang. | It's a lot of fun. I love driving it

Hi there, I'm an officer in the police force. What do you do for a living? | I'm a lawyer. I've worked for a few different law firms and have even started my own. | Aww, I'm sorry to hear that. Cats are great pets. | Yeah, they are. I miss him.
I'm sure you'll find another one someday. | Thanks, I hope so. | We should have a baking competition sometime! | That would be fun! I'm sure we would both make delicious desserts.

I'm sure we would! I love to try new recipes, so I'm always looking for new challenges. | Me too! I love to experiment in the kitchen. | I like to ride my motorcycle and I'm a big fan of road trips. I also love to cook and I'm always looking for new recipes. | That sounds like a lot of fun! I've always wanted to try riding a motorcycle, but I'm not sure if I'm brave enough.

It's definitely a lot of fun, but it can be dangerous. I've been riding for a few years now and I've never had an accident, but I always wear my helmet and gear. | That's good to know. I'll have to keep that in mind if I ever decide to give it a try. | Oh, that's nice! I'm from Georgia too! What do you like to do for fun? | I enjoy spending time outdoors, especially riding horses. I also love gardening and cooking.

That sounds really fun! I love gardening too. I do a lot of weeding and yard work to keep fit. | I wish I could do more gardening, but I have to lose weight before I can ride my horses again. | It's not that hard! You just have to practice. | I guess so. I'll have to try it sometime.
You should! It's really fun. | Thanks for the advice. I might just do that. | That's great! Do you have any pets? | Yes, I have a dog and a cat.

That's awesome! I love pets. I have a dog and a cat too. | What are their names? | I understand, I'm not always close with my family either. But I love them and I'm grateful for them. | I'm glad to hear that! I'm going to go make some coffee, how about you?

Sounds good! I'm going to go for a run. I always relax by going for a run after a long day of designing and testing new environmental technologies. | That sounds like a great way to relax! I'm going to enjoy my coffee and watch some more TV. | I know, it's not a popular opinion, but I love the taste! | Well, I'm glad you enjoy it!
Thanks! What do you do for fun? | I love to make soap, and I'm also afraid of heights. | Really? That's so cool! I would love to learn how to garden. | I would be happy to teach you!
That would be great! I'm free this weekend, if you want to come over. | Sure! I'll bring some plants and tools. | Hey! How are you today? | Hey, I'm good. How about you?

I'm doing great! I just got back from a walk in the woods. | That sounds nice. I wish I could go on more walks, but I don't have a lot of time. | I'm hoping so! I'm really excited to see her smile. | I'm sure she will. I'm glad you have such a close relationship with your mom. I miss my mom a lot.

I'm sorry to hear that. I know how you feel. I lost my dad a few years ago. | I'm sorry to hear that. How are you coping? | Oh, that's great! I wish I could have gone. I'm a big fan of hers. | Me too! She's one of my favorite artists.

What's your favorite song by her? | It's hard to choose, but I think my favorite song is "Tik Tok." | That sounds amazing! I've never been on a glacier before. | It's definitely worth checking out if you get the chance. It's an incredible feeling to be standing on top of a glacier.

I'll definitely have to put that on my bucket list! | You won't regret it! | I have never seen that one. What's it about? | It's about a bunch of thieves who are caught up in a murder investigation. It's really good!

Sounds interesting! I'll have to check it out. | You should! What's your favorite thing to do for fun? | Me too! It's so much fun to try new things. | I know, right? It's so rewarding to finish a project and see how it turns out.
Definitely! It's a great feeling. | What's your favorite thing to knit? | Okay, I'll send you a link to my stories. | Great, thanks! I'm looking forward to reading them.

No problem! | What else do you like to do for fun? | I love Sailor Moon too!  My favorite character to cosplay as is Flash!  I love the Flash's super speed, and I think the costume is really cool. | Flash is a great choice!  He's one of my favorite superheroes too.  I love his super speed and his sense of humor.

My favorite thing about Flash is his ability to connect with people.  He's always there to help those in need, and he always finds a way to make everyone laugh.  What do you love most about Flash? | I love that Flash is always there to help people.  He's a true hero, and he always finds a way to make the world a better place.  I also love his sense of humor.  He can always find a way to make me laugh, even when I'm feeling down. | Not much, just getting ready for a party I'm planning | Oh cool,

A campfire party | Sounds fun, have you been to a lot of campfire parties? | It's actually pretty simple. The water heater has a solar panel on top, which collects the sun's energy. The energy is then used to heat the water inside the heater. | That's amazing! I can't believe I've never heard of this before.

Yeah, it's pretty cool. I'm really excited to see how it works out. | I'm sure it's going to be great! | I'm sure it will be a great experience. Do you know what you're going to do while you're there? | We're going to be visiting a lot of different temples and shrines, and we're also going to go to Tokyo Disneyland.
That sounds like a lot of fun! I'm sure you'll have a great time. | Thanks! I'm looking forward to it. | That sounds amazing! I'm going to have to try it sometime. | You definitely should

What's up? | Not a lot just got back from a morning run | It's hard to pick a favorite book, but I really love The Name of the Wind by Patrick Rothfuss. I love the world-building and the characters are so well-developed. It's a really immersive experience, and I can't wait to see what happens next. | It sounds like a great book! Yeah, it is a little chilly. | But it's a nice day to go for a walk. | No problem! What's your favorite type of music? | I like a lot of different types of music, but I'm mostly into rock and alternative
Me too! I love rock and alternative | What are some of your favorite bands? | Me neither! But it's still fun to try. | Agreed

Hello! How is your day going? | Good, good! I am just working at my candy store, listening to Gorillaz. | Oh, that's cool! I've never been there, but I've always wanted to go. | You should! It's a really cool place. I go every time I'm in Cooperstown.

I will have to put that on my list of places to visit. | You should! It's a really cool place. I go every time I'm in Cooperstown. | What do you like to do for fun? | I love to dress up and express my personality and creativity.

Thanks! I'll definitely let you know if I do. | Great! I'd love to see what you make. | Thanks. I hope so. | What do you like to do when you're not hiking?

I like to play music and go hunting. | That sounds fun. Do you play any instruments? | I love When Harry Met Sally, Sleepless in Seattle, and You've Got Mail. | Those are all great movies!  I love When Harry Met Sally too!

It's so good!  What are some of your favorite songs by the Red Hot Chili Peppers? | I love Can't Stop, Under the Bridge, and Californication. | I'm a busy person who enjoys my downtime on weekends. I'm always up for a good book. I recently finished reading "The Martian" by Andy Weir and really enjoyed it. | I've heard good things about that book. I'll have to check it out. I'm a big fan of sci-fi. | Great! I can't wait to see you! | Hey, I'm here!
Perfect timing! The pie is just out of the oven! | I can smell it! It smells delicious! | Hey, how are you doing? | I'm doing ok, thanks for asking.

What's your favorite type of music? | I like a variety of music, but I'm really into punk and rock right now. | What kind of books do you like to read? | I like to read all kinds of books, but I especially like historical fiction and mysteries.

I love historical fiction too! I've been reading a lot of historical romance novels lately. | Oh, I love romance novels! I've been reading a lot of them too. | Hey, what's up? I'm [name]. | Nice to meet you, [name]. I'm [name].

Nice to meet you too. What do you like to do for fun? | I like to read, write, and spend time in nature. I also like online shopping and collecting memories from my vacations. | I'm sure it's not as bad as you think! | It's not bad. But I definitely prefer my time in the theater.
Well, it sounds like you have a lot of interests. That's good! | Yeah, I'm pretty lucky | Me too! | He's so funny.

Yeah, he is. | I'm glad we have similar tastes in movies. | I have a lot of work to do, but I'm also going to take a break and cuddle with my dog Wonwon. | That sounds like a great way to relax. I love cuddling with my dog, too.
Me too. He's the best. | He sounds like a great dog. | Maybe I will! I'm sure my parents wouldn't approve of my music hobby though. | What kind of music do you play?
I play Dungeons and Dragons. | I've never heard of that. | I will! Thanks for the tip. | You're welcome. So, what else do you like to do?
I like to read. My favorite book is The Great Gatsby. | I love The Great Gatsby! I read it in high school and it's one of my favorites. | It is! | So, what do you think about the weather today?
It's a little chilly, but it's not too bad. | Yeah, it's not too bad. | Thanks for the advice! I'll definitely check it out. | No problem! If you have any questions, feel free to ask me.

That's too bad. They're really great pets. | Yeah, I've heard. I'm hoping to eventually get over my allergy so I can have one. | Me too! Those are my favorite. | They're so good! I could eat them all day long.

I love to spend time with my family and friends. I also love to read, dance, and go on adventures. | Those all sound like fun activities! I love to spend time with my family too.
